title: How to extract the first name from a full name
task: Pull just the first name out of a 'First Last' text string.
keywords: separate first name from full name google sheets

excel.note: FIND locates the first space; LEFT takes everything before it.

explanation: FIND(" ",A2) returns the position of the first space; subtracting 1 stops just before it, and LEFT returns that many characters from the start. For 'Jane Doe' the result is 'Jane'. Wrap in IFERROR to handle single-word names.
